human_actions_pending.action: Watch GitHub CI on PR #1 (if configured) and merge when green
human_actions_pending.context: Standard PR review/merge flow. Two independent observers already verified (prime UAT + coach D-NN audit).
Archive v1.0 milestone artifacts and prep state for next milestone.

decisions.rationale: Ship workflow preflight strictly requires VERIFICATION.md; UAT.md captured all 4 SCs as PASS so synthesis is over-already-verified evidence (not new work).
User chose 'commit both' over gitignore — keeps coach-prime topology notes and GSD config in version control. Both files vetted for secrets (none).

decisions.decision: Shipped the full diff (86 commits including .planning/ docs) rather than using /gsd-pr-branch
decisions.rationale: User chose full-diff over filtered. Reviewer sees the full reasoning trail alongside the code change.

next_action: Watch PR #1 CI; merge when ready; /gsd-complete-milestone after merge
context_notes: Milestone v1.0 SHIPPED. All 3 phases verified. PR #1 open at https://github.com/petergiordano/plg-readiness/pull/1. Branch rebrand-theming is at parity with origin (last commit 173e997). No in-progress work to resume — the resuming session's only outstanding items are PR review/merge and post-merge /gsd-complete-milestone.
